mapper.select: SELECT p.productSeq , p.productName , p.productDesc , p.price*(1 - (d.discountRate*0.01)) AS reducedPrice, CONCAT(ROUND(d.discountRate), '%') AS discountRate, p.groupId , p.price , p.imageURL , p.isClose FROM product p LEFT JOIN discount d ON p.discountSeq = d.discountSeq WHERE p.productSeq = #{productSeq}

SELECT m.materialSeq , m.materialName , m.materialCode FROM product p JOIN material m ON p.productSeq = m.productSeq WHERE p.productSeq = #{productSeq} ORDER BY CASE WHEN m.materialName REGEXP '[가-힣]' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN m.materialName REGEXP '[가-힣]' THEN m.materialName END DESC
SELECT ps.productSizeSeq , ps.sizeName FROM productSize ps WHERE ps.groupId = #{groupId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO userCart( userSeq, productSeq, productSizeSeq, materialSeq, orderMemo, quantity, updatedAt ) VALUES ( ( SELECT userSeq FROM user WHERE userId = #{userId} ), #{productSeq}, #{productSizeSeq}, #{materialSeq}, #{orderMemo}, 1 , NOW() )
